title: Sub-agent parallelism pattern validated — 5 parallel agents, ~55% context savings
signal: Sub-agent parallelism pattern validated for hub advisor builds: Spinner (sequential, file deps), then Cartologist+Quartermaster+Octo in parallel. Each agent marks its own lug completed and appends to track. 5 agents total consumed ~280k tokens vs estimated 600k+ in single context. Context savings ~55%.
rationale: Establishes the agent dispatch pattern for multi-advisor builds. Reusable for spoke advisor stubs (Archie/Will/Jordy/Mark/Clara) and any future parallel implementation work.
